01_Repeaters.notes: Primary KL repeater, Bukit Nenas Tower

REAKSI group repeater, Bukit Panchor. FM + C4FM capable. Covers Kedah/Penang border

2m SSB calling, used for weak-signal work

UHF APRS secondary freq / digital modes

04_Marine.notes: Ch 16: International distress, safety, and calling channel. Mandatory watch on all vessels.
Ch 70: Digital distress alerting. RX only for monitoring.
Ch 13: Bridge-to-bridge, navigational safety. Required on all vessels.
Ch 87: AIS channel 1. RX only for monitoring.
Ch 88: AIS channel 2. RX only for monitoring.

06_APRS.notes: Standard APRS frequency for ITU Region 3. 1200 baud AFSK (Bell 202).
Alternate APRS frequency sometimes used in Asia.
APRS digipeater, Bukit Takun area, Kuala Lumpur.
APRS iGate, KL — forwards packets to APRS-IS.

07_Satellites.notes: ISS FM voice — when crew available for amateur contacts.
ISS APRS digipeater. 1200 baud AFSK on 145.825 MHz.
FM repeater satellite. Requires 67.0 Hz CTCSS uplink tone.
FM satellite. 67.0 Hz CTCSS. Status may vary — check AMSAT.
V/U linear transponder. LSB up / USB down.
Linear transponder. LSB up / USB down.
Linear transponder. LSB up / USB down.
